limits: The evaluator is evidence-only and has selection_effect none.
The frozen evaluation corpus contains 43 artifacts and explicitly excludes post-audit COMP-0027.
The whitespace_word_count_v1 estimator is a deterministic graph-budget estimate, not a model tokenizer.
Existing semantic compact coverage is limited to 17 of 43 artifacts: 14 SYNCOMP synthesis sections and 3 ABS abstraction sections.
Persisted L0 records, canonically linked L1 records, and persisted ArtifactSummary records were unavailable in the audited corpus.
The metadata lower-bound scenario is semantically insufficient and is not an implemented compact context representation.
The capability does not create or persist compact representations.

The capability does not modify ContextPackManifest.items, context selection, providers, prompts, CLI behavior, authoritative lineage, graph persistence, retrieval, embeddings, reranking, indexes, memory stores, or runtime manifests.
The capability does not satisfy or close GAP-0002.
name: Compact graph representation coverage and packing evaluator
recommended_next_actions: Keep GAP-0002 open because this capability measures representation fitness but does not implement graph-local scoped memory.
Propose a separate governed compact representation contract for AI-optimized artifact sidecars before changing context selection.
Define required semantic fields, provenance, versioning, token targets, regeneration rules, and fidelity tests for immediate-neighbor and second-level representations.
Treat generation of sidecars, integration into graph packing, provider exposure, and automatic inclusion as later separately admitted slices.
risks: Whitespace token estimates may differ from actual provider tokenizer costs.
The frozen corpus protects reproducibility but does not automatically evaluate later artifacts.
Metadata-only packing can overstate practical coverage because metadata is not semantically sufficient graph-local context.
A future compact sidecar contract could lose critical claims, provenance, constraints, or uncertainty unless separately specified and validated.
summary: Provides a deterministic, read-only evaluator for compact representation coverage and hypothetical distance-aware graph-neighborhood packing. It inventories existing L0, L1, ArtifactSummary, SYNCOMP synthesis, and ABS abstraction representations; evaluates a frozen 43-artifact corpus across five graph budgets; separates lineage isolation from budget exclusion; and emits reproducible JSON and Markdown evidence. It has selection_effect none and changes no context selection or runtime behavior.
